titleStmt.title: SII 5.459: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 459. (A.R. No. 166 of 1894). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE PUSHPAVANESVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUPPUNDURUTTI, TANJORE TALUK AND SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmalar vaḷartikaḻ tirumakaḷ pukaḻākam puṇarn tiruppa nāmalar vaḷar kalai vañci nalamiku māmaṉat tuṟaiyac cimaiyavarait tiṟaṉmaṭantai tiruttoḷiṉ micai vāḻa vimaiyavar
ko ṉaṉṟiṭṭa veḻilāraṅ kaḻut tilaṅkap pakiratipol tuyyapukaṭ paṭara valli koḻuntoṭṭat tikirivaraik kappuṟattuc ceḻuntikiri ceṉṟulavat taṇṭāroḷit taṉikkavitai teṇṭirai cūḻ pārniḻaṟṟa ve
ṅkopak kali kaṭintu ceṅko leṇṭicai naṭappat temmuṟaciṉ mukil muḻaṅkac cilai yakaṉṟu vicumpaṭaiyat tiṟaṟpuli poy vaṉamaṭaiyak kayaliraṇṭu neṭuñcikarak kaṉavaraiyiṉ viḷaiyāṭa vorumaimaṉat tirupiṟappiṉ muttiyiṉ nāl
vetat tarumaṟaiyo raivveḻvi yāṟaṅkamuṭaṉ ciṟappa varuntamiḻu māriyamu maṟucamaiyat taṟaneṟiyun tiruntu maṉuṉeṟiyun tiṟampāttu taḻaittoṅkak kuccararu māriyarum kocalaruṅ koṅkaṇarum vacciraruṅ kāciyaru māttararu
rumaṉaruñ coṉakarum vantiyaru mutalāya virunila māmuṭiventa riṟaiñci niṉṟu tiṟaikāṭṭavum neṭuvāḷum vayapperum puraviyun toṭi neṭun toḷume tuṇaiyeṉac ceṉṟu ceraṉun tāṉaiyuñ ceruk
kaḷat toḻiya vavarācum pularā malaināṭu nūṟap parumāmarapiṟ porutiṟal mikka ceṉṉiyait tiṟaikoṇṭu tiṇṭoḷvaliyiṟ poṉṉināṭṭup pocalat taraicarkaḷaip puricaiyi laṭaittup poṅkuvirap puraviyur ceruviṟal
Āṇmai ciṅkaṇaṉ mutalāya taṇṭat talaivarun tāṉaiyum paṭat tuṇṭit taḷavil cori veṅkaluṭ perumpiṇak kuṉṟa miruṅkaḷa ṉiṟaittup paruntuṅ kākamum pāṟuṅ kacaiyu marunti mikaḻntāl Amaṟkaḷa meṭuppak kama ṇai
yuṅ kaviṉap puraviyuñ cempoṟ kuvaiyun tikaḻkatirmaṇiyu maṭantaiya rarā mārpumuṭaṉkavarntaruḷi mutukiṭu pocalaṉ ṟaṉṉoṭu muṉaiyumatu tavaṟeṉṟavaṉṟaṉṉai veṟpeṟṟi naṭa tupo luṭpakaiyāy niṉṟa cemaṉaik koṉ
ṟu ciṉan taṇintaruḷi naṇṇutal piṟarā leṇṇutaṟ kariya kaṇṇaṉuṟ koppattaik kaikkoṇṭaruḷip poṉṉicūḻ celva puṉṉāṭṭai poṉṉināṭeṉak kāttaruḷa ceyaperuvarai yaraṇiṟ piṉṉarukākkiya karunaṭarāca
ṉaik kaḷiṟu tiṟaikoṇṭu tulaṅkoḷi maṇiyuñ cūḻiveḻamu milaṅkai kāvalaṉai yiṟaikoṇṭaruḷi varutiṟai maṟutta vaṅkaṉaip piṭittuk karumukil nikaḷaṅ kāliṟ kottu ventar kaṇṭaṟiyā viṟaṟṟiṇpuracaic centamaṅkalac ceḻumpati muṟṟip
pallavaṉaṭuṅkap pal porāṭi nelviḷaināṭu neṭumperum poṉṉum parumaiyāṉaiyum pariyu mutaliya varacurimai kaikkoṇ ṭaracavaṟ kaḷittut tillaiyampalattut tirunaṭampayilun tollaiyiṟaivar tuṇaikkaḻal vaṇa
ṅkik kuḷirpoḻil puṭaicūḻ koḻimāṉaka raḷiceṟi vempi ṉaṇimalar kalanta toṅkal vākait toṭaikaḷ cūṭṭit tiṅka ḷuyarmarapu tikaḻa vantirunta taṉṉacaiyā ṉaṉṉilai vicaiyampi ṉeṇṇeṇkalai teriṉa moḻippāvalar maṇṇiṉame
lūḻi vāḻkeṉa vāḻttak kaṇṭavar maṉamuṅ kaṇkaḷuṅ kaḷippa veṇṭirai makaravelaiyi ṉeṭuvarai yāyiram paṇaippaṇat taṉantaṉ mimicaip pāyalkoḷḷum paramayokat toruperuṅ kaṭavu ḷuvantiṉituṟaiyu miperuṅ kaṭalviriyiṭainilat tilaṅkun tiruvaraṅkam peruñ
celvam ciṟappapa paṉmuṟai paṇi tulaāpāra meṟip poṉmalaiyeṉṉa polintu toṉṟavum poṉmeyntaruḷiya cempoṟ koyiluḷ vaḷartikaḻpā lutaiyaveṟpaṉait tiruvaḷar kulamaṇic ciṅkācaṉamicaik kalaiyeṉa makiḻn tiṉiteṟit tiṉakaroda yameṉac ce
ḻuṅkatir coriyum kaṉakamāmuṭi kaviṉpeṟac cūṭip pārāḷ ven=ta rurimai �rivaiya rirumaruṅku niṉṟu viriperuṅ kavariyiṉ mantavāṭaiyu malaitteṉṟalu maāntaḷiṟ karaṅkoṇ ṭacaiya vica vorupoḻutum viṭātuṭaṉiruntu makiḻum tirumakaḷeṉṉa tiruttoḷ mevi yot
ta muṭi cūṭi yuyur peraāṇai tikkeṭṭu naṭappac ceḻuntavañ ceyta vivaṉpo lulakile viraṉ palattira matimukat tavaṉimāmaka ḷilaku koṭik kātal mukuḻttu niṉṟettu mulakumuḻutumuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu
7 vatu kanni nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa ttu trayodaśi yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ pāṇṭikulapativaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭukūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiruppūnturuttiuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśva ratevarkaṉmikaḷukku Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam brama tecam tiruppūnturutti Uḷḷiṭṭu teṉkarai vaṭakaraippaṭṭa te
vatāṉamāṉa Ūrkaḷil Akarabrahadeśa ṅkaḷā nam vyavasthai Innāyaṉār koyil tirumeṉināyaṉmāril puṣpa vaṉapperumāṉaiyum nācciyāraiyum nāyakar tiruviti nācciyār marakatanācciyāraiyum periyatevanāyaṉāraiyum nācciyāraiyum Iṉṉāṭṭuk kiḷiyūrnāṭṭuk kiḻmāntuṭai
yāṉa Uyyavantāṉ Irācarācatevar kumpiṭṭu Innāyaṉmārkkum nāccimārkkum Amutupaṭi paṭiviñcaṉattukku Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam kiḻaipparivaṇṭattuṟaiyil curaikkuṭaiyāṉ Āḷuṭaināyaṉ pakkal tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Ivarvilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta po
poyilināyakampakkal taṭi Oṉṟiṉāl kuḻi 1000 2 10 5 ṉāl nilam Ima Innilam Araiyekāṇiyiṉāl pottakam Eṟṟiṉa nilam cantirātittavaraiyum mutal Aṭaṅka Iṟai yili ceytu kuṭukkaiyil Inilam Ivvūrilk kaḻittu Innilattāl varum Ankarāyavaricai
ppaṭi kācum Oṭṭupaṭi nellukkum pūṇṭa tevarkaṭamaiyum puṟa Uṭalkkaṭamaiyum viṉipokaṅkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭu Ūrmāttāl vanta kaṭamai kuṭimai Innāyiṉār tevattaṉamāṉaRead tevatāṉamāṉa.ūrkaḷ pottakappaṭi nilattile
viḻukkāṭu koṇṭu IṟukkakkaṭavomākaRead sammatittu.sammatattu kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom Ippaṭi vyavasthe [..*]
Digital edition of SII 5.459 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
